title: Version 2.0.17 Changelog
items: Add Electron client heartbeat to display connected desktop clients
Refactor Settings UI to a sidebar layout for better navigation
Show creation date and MFA status in profile information
Fix settings page navbar on mobile view
Add auto background update for electron client app
Rename 'Spatial Notes' heading to Notes for wiki
Update wiki dependencies for Docusaurus 3.10.0 compatibility
Update backend and frontend package dependencies
